title: selinum libanotis
intro: Selinum libanotis, also known as lovage, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family. Traditionally, lovage has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as bloating and gas, due to its carminative and diuretic effects. The health benefits of lovage include reducing inflammation, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting respiratory health. Lovage can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or dried herb, and has also been used in culinary applications to add flavor to soups and stews.
